title: Budgets for API keys on AI Gateway
summary: Budgets for API keys on AI Gateway
whyItMatters: AI costs are getting harder to forecast. As teams lean more on coding agents and other token-heavy workflows, a key can burn cost faster than anyone notices: Autonomous workflows that can loop or fan out without supervision Demos and prototypes that could catch unexpected traffic if shared or shipped Developers exploring or experimenting without a sense of…
